name: test_details_mav_853
description:
1. Upload vaccination records for a patient that doesn't contain vaccine information (VACCINE_GIVEN column)
2. Navigate to the patient, either in a session or from the global children view
3. Expected: patient details can be seen
Actual: crash
descriptionHtml:
1. Upload vaccination records for a patient that doesn't contain vaccine information (VACCINE_GIVEN column)
  2. Navigate to the patient, either in a session or from the global children view
  3. Expected: patient details can be seen
    Actual: crash
statusTrace:
setup_mav_853 = None
children_page = <mavis.test.pages.children.ChildrenPage object at 0x7ff21f6d47d0>
schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Sturminster Newton High School', urn='149657'), School(name='Eagle Park Independent School', urn...rn='150272')], 'flu': [School(name='Sedbergh School', urn='112451'), School(name='King Richard School', urn='132420')]}
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Denise', last_name='CLARKE', nhs_number='9735073714', address=('Studio 9', 'Hannah shoal', ...example.org'), Parent(full_name='Abbie Watkins-Clarke', relationship='Mum', email_address='georgina68@example.com')))]}

    @issue("MAV-853")
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_details_mav_853(setup_mav_853, children_page, schools, children):
        """
        1. Upload vaccination records for a patient that doesn't contain vaccine information (VACCINE_GIVEN column)
        2. Navigate to the patient, either in a session or from the global children view
        3. Expected: patient details can be seen
        Actual: crash
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
        school = schools[Programme.HPV][0]
    
        children_page.search_with_all_filters_for_child_name(str(child))
        children_page.click_record_for_child(child)
        # Verify activity log
        children_page.click_activity_log()
        children_page.expect_text_in_main("Vaccinated with Gardasil 9")
        # Verify vaccination record
        children_page.click_child_record()
>       children_page.click_vaccination_details(school)
